---
title: "About"
body-classes: section-page
---

<div class="epigraph" lang="el">
<p>πάντες ἄνθρωποι τοῦ εἰδέναι ὀρέγονται φύσει.</p>
<p class="translation" lang="en">By nature, all human beings desire to know.</p>
</div>

Working on statistics, applied mathematics, and machine learning.

This site is for notes and experiments — things worth writing down.
